payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it represents the current memory that Sam is from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because mem_old has been superseded, so it should not be shown as the active or current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it was marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall system selected the non-superseded memory record for Sam and excluded the superseded older record.

payload.intent: Explain the recall decision for Sam's affiliation, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: The older memory for Sam was filtered because it is superseded.

details: Explained that mem_new was returned as the current memory.
Explained that mem_old was filtered due to supersession.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.
